sub_modules.fft_sign_extend: Combinational sign extension from input precision to internal output precision.
sub_modules.fft_radix2_butterfly: Combinational radix-2 butterfly add/subtract primitive for complex samples.
sub_modules.fft_twiddle_rom: Combinational twiddle factor lookup interface for per-stage complex rotation.
sub_modules.fft_complex_mult: Combinational fixed-point complex multiplier used for twiddle rotation.
sub_modules.fft_stage_select: Combinational per-stage selector that chooses butterfly sum or rotated difference path.
